summary: ETF→Futures Gamma conversion fully verified. All 11 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: MNQ shows gamma levels (Put Wall 23,927, ZGL 24,450, Call Wall 24,339) correctly converted to futures prices (>10,000). MES shows gamma levels (~6,500) correctly in MES futures range. Chart plots gamma lines near futures price. TICK Index correctly removed. No console errors.

context_for_next_testing_agent: ETF→Futures conversion fully tested. The conversion uses price ratio (futures_price / etf_spot_price) to convert gamma levels from ETF (QQQ/SPY) to futures (MNQ/MES). For MNQ: QQQ ~$585 → MNQ ~$24,000, ratio ~41x. For MES: SPY ~$590 → MES ~$6,100, ratio ~10x. The conversion is centralized in backend (server.py lines 3620-3624 for V3 signal, lines 4307-4316 for /api/analyze). Frontend correctly displays futures_* fields from real_gamma. Chart uses futures_call_wall, futures_put_wall, futures_zgl for price lines. Market is closed (weekend) so DataBento data is simulated, but gamma data is real from yfinance options chain.

feature_verification.v3_signal_context_gamma: Working - call_wall, put_wall, zgl at root and nested gamma object

mocked_api_note: DataBento live trades simulated on weekends. Gamma data is REAL from yfinance options chain (QQQ/SPY). SignalStack orders are MOCKED in paper mode.
